createPage.createdRecordDescription: The lead has been captured successfully.

toast.errorDescription: Please review the lead details and try again.
toast.successDescription: {name} is ready for qualification and handoff.

createPage.title: Create Lead

detailPage.convertDescription: Prepare the qualified lead for customer creation while preserving lineage.
detailPage.convertErrorDescription: Please review the conversion fields and try again.
detailPage.conversionSummaryDescription: Review the stored downstream links and the recorded conversion path for this lead.
detailPage.planDescription: Select which downstream records should be created or prepared from this qualified lead.

detailPage.planSelectTargetError: Select at least one conversion target first.
detailPage.planSuccessDescription: The selected lead conversion steps completed successfully.

planTargetDescription.customer: Create or reuse the downstream customer record.

planTargetDescription.quotation: Continue into prefilled quotation authoring with the lead context preserved.

detailPage.convertSuccessDescription: Customer {customerId} was created from this lead.
detailPage.handoffDescription: Advance a qualified lead into the Story 23.2 opportunity seam without creating an opportunity record yet.

detailPage.handoffSuccessDescription: {name} is ready for the opportunity pipeline handoff.
detailPage.lifecycleDescription: Change the visible lead lifecycle without introducing quotation or order writes.
detailPage.profileDescription: Review and update the core lead profile, qualification, and attribution fields.

toast.updateErrorDescription: Please review the lead changes and try again.

detailPage.transitionErrorDescription: This lifecycle change is not allowed.

duplicateWarning.description: Review the matching records before creating another lead.

createPage.createdRecordDescription: The quotation draft is ready for review and follow-up.

createPage.title: Create Quotation

detailPage.conversionBlockedState: This quotation is not in a convertible lifecycle state. Move it back to an active quotation state before starting order intake.
detailPage.conversionComplete: This quotation is fully covered by linked orders. Review the linked orders below or revise the quotation if commercial scope changes.
detailPage.conversionDescription: Carry quotation context into the existing pending-order intake flow and keep downstream confirmation semantics unchanged.
detailPage.conversionErrorDescription: Resolve the customer or product mapping context and try again.
detailPage.conversionErrorTitle: Order conversion could not be prepared
detailPage.conversionNote: Open the existing order form with quotation party, lines, notes, addresses, attribution, and source lineage prefilled. Invoice creation and stock reservation still wait for confirmation.

detailPage.profileDescription: Review and update party targeting, commercial totals, addresses, and terms.
detailPage.remainingComplete: All quoted commercial scope is already covered by linked orders.

setup.adminOnlyNotice: CRM setup is restricted to administrators and owners.
setup.customerGroupsDescription: Maintain customer-group hierarchy used by opportunities and quotations.
setup.description: Control CRM defaults and the master values used across lead, opportunity, and quotation workflows.

setup.salesStagesDescription: Define the sales stages and probabilities available in the active pipeline.

reporting.analyticsDescription: Review stable CRM KPI definitions, funnel movement, terminal outcomes, and owner performance from stored CRM lineage.
reporting.comparisonDescription: Compare the selected CRM period against a prior baseline using the same metric definitions.
reporting.description: Track pipeline totals, drop-off, and segment performance across the CRM funnel.
reporting.drilldownDescription: Click a KPI card or funnel stage to inspect the underlying read-only CRM records.

reporting.dropOffDescription: Closed-lost and terminal records grouped by lifecycle outcome.

reporting.funnelDescription: Track how qualified leads progress through opportunity, quotation, and converted outcomes.
